COMPOSITE FORMULA
Score = 0.10×Trend + 0.08×TrendShort + 0.12×MACDTrend + 0.10×MACDMom + 0.28×RSI + 0.17×(1-Vol) + 0.15×Breadth
• Score ≥70 → R0 (Healthy) | Score 30-70 → R1 (Choppy) | Score ≤30 → R2 (Risk-Off)
